# Support

Looking for help with MGM Atlas? Pick the right channel:

| I want to… | Go to |
|---|---|
| 🐛 Report a bug in the API | [Open a bug report](https://github.com/MGM-Laboratory/mgm-atlas-backend/issues/new/choose) |
| 💡 Ask a question or propose an idea | [Discussions](https://github.com/MGM-Laboratory/mgm-atlas-frontend/discussions) (shared front door for both repos) |
| 🔒 Report a security problem | [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md) — never a public issue |
| 📊 Check whether Atlas is up | [atlas.labmgm.org/api/v1/health](https://atlas.labmgm.org/api/v1/health) |
| 📖 Learn how to use the app | [Frontend README — user guide](https://github.com/MGM-Laboratory/mgm-atlas-frontend#readme) |
| 📧 Reach the maintainers privately | [atlas@labmgm.org](mailto:atlas@labmgm.org) |

Issues are triaged weekly; bugs labeled `priority: high` get attention first.
